user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Adidas
Product type: Samba OG retro sneakers
Tone: classic, authentic, sporty
Visual style: A clean, vintage-inspired aesthetic with muted color palettes and nostalgic urban settings that highlight the sneaker's heritage.
Conceptual technique: heritage storytelling combined with lifestyle aspiration
Format: image

brief.visual_style: A clean, vintage-inspired aesthetic with muted color palettes and nostalgic urban settings that highlight the sneaker's heritage.
brief.conceptual_technique: heritage storytelling combined with lifestyle aspiration
brief.headline: Step Into Legacy
brief.subheadline: Samba OG – Timeless Style, Enduring Performance
brief.body_copy: Since 1949, Samba has been the heartbeat of the streets and the pitch. Embrace the original with the Samba OG retro sneakers, crafted for those who value authenticity and sport-driven heritage. Classic design meets modern comfort – a sneaker to carry your story forward.
brief.call_to_action: Discover the heritage. Own the moment.

visual_direction.setting: Nostalgic urban environments such as cobblestone streets, vintage soccer fields, and classic cityscapes during golden hour.
visual_direction.color_palette: Muted tones with warm sepia and pastel accents to evoke a vintage feel.
visual_direction.composition: Close-up shots of the Samba OG sneakers worn in action – walking, casual urban movement – paired with wider lifestyle shots capturing individuals embodying sporty confidence and classic style.
visual_direction.props: Vintage soccer balls, retro sports gear, and iconic urban elements like old school bicycles or street lamps.
visual_direction.models: Diverse individuals styled in classic sporty apparel reflecting both past and present eras.
visual_direction.lighting: Soft natural lighting with a warm glow to enhance the nostalgic atmosphere.
